showRequest: Book Rex Dominion vs Steel Purity
wrestlerMessage: Rex wants a shot at Purity. We're paying to make it happen.

showRequest: Book Steel Purity vs Slick Vince
wrestlerMessage: Purity is done with Rex. It's Vince who needs to be made an example of.

showRequest: Book Slick Vince vs Iron Maddox
wrestlerMessage: Vince has been dodging Maddox long enough. Book it.
Maddox doesn't care who it is. He'll smash whoever shows up.

showRequest: Book Dazzle King vs Rookie Blaze
wrestlerMessage: Dazzle King and Blaze have been going back and forth. Give the crowd what they want.

showRequest: Book Rookie Blaze vs Dazzle King
wrestlerMessage: Blaze vs Dazzle King. The fans are already chanting for it.

showRequest: Book my wrestler in the main event
wrestlerMessage: Golden Tyrant wants Maddox and the money is on the table. Make it the main event.
